title: Ecommerce Operations Assistant
description:
Retykle is Asia’s first and largest online consignment store for buying and selling designer baby, children's & maternity fashion, gear and toys. Our mission is to make buying and selling high quality pre-loved items as good, if not better than buying new. We sell over 2500 of the world’s best children’s and maternity brands at a fraction of traditional prices - up to 90% off. For sellers, we take the hassle out of resale. We allow parents to turn their kids' closets into cash without lifting a finger. We are a purpose led company with a strong environmental mission to create a longer lifespan for children’s products by keeping them in circulation and out of landfills. Our obsession with great customer service has created a community of loyalists who have not only embraced a new way of shopping for their kids but also helped spread the Retykle word to other families.

The platform started in Hong Kong in 2016 and launched into our first overseas market in Singapore in 2021. We are looking for talented people who are hungry to learn and contribute to our team. If you don’t mind getting your hands dirty, question the norm and believe in a collective action against climate change, then this is the place for you.

You may visit our website to learn more: https://www.retykle.sg/

Job Description

  • Manage order fulfillment, order picking & packing and tracking of inventory.
  • Product photography, loading products to website, studio assistance
  • Deliver customer service and manage customer experience as a Retykle brand ambassador, drive awareness around sustainability and concept of circular fashion.
  • Assist in offline events such as pop-up events.
  • Any relevant ad-hoc duties as required.

Requirements

  • Prior experience with e-commerce, retail operations and/or logistics a plus
  • Interest in technology, fashion, e-commerce, and/or sustainability
  • Enjoy working in an entrepreneurial and start-up culture.
  • Enthusiasm for creating efficient processes and solving problems.
  • Have the ability to work independently and be self-motivated while still working within a team environment.
  • Strong attention to detail, hands-on with organisation skills
  • Fluent in English

hiringCompany.description:
Retykle is Asia’s first and largest online consignment store for buying and selling designer baby, children's & maternity fashion, gear and toys. 


Our mission is to make buying and selling high quality pre-loved items as good, if not better than buying new. We sell over 2500 of the world’s best children’s and maternity brands at a fraction of traditional prices - up to 90% off. For sellers, we take the hassle out of resale. 

We allow parents to turn their kids closets into cash without lifting a finger whilst also benefiting the environment.


The platform started in Hong Kong in 2016 but we are growing rapidly and have just launched our fully circular offering in Singapore - www.retykle.sg. 

We are looking for talented people who are hungry to learn and contribute to our team.
hiringCompany.name: RETYKLE (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
